jira_tickets.description: The initial page load request for /mi-admin.com returns an HTTP/2 404 error, halting application hydration downstream.
jira_tickets.acceptance_criteria: The endpoint /mi-admin.com returns HTTP 200 OK or an explicit verified redirection route on a fresh browser reload.

jira_tickets.summary: [P0] Runtime JS Error — Null Pointer accessing element style property
jira_tickets.description: Asynchronous application initialisation scripts attempt to read and write properties on null selector returns, resulting in an Uncaught TypeError.
jira_tickets.acceptance_criteria: All DOM manipulation targets are securely wrapped behind variable existence checks before invoking sub-properties or event bindings.

jira_tickets.summary: [P1] Cookie Domain Rejection Error — Origin Mismatch on mi-admin.com
jira_tickets.description: Multiple core validation and telemetry cookies (acts, acti, dTValidationCookie) are rejected by the browser due to invalid domain assignment.
jira_tickets.acceptance_criteria: Cookie scope configurations match the issuing domain context explicitly or omit domain parameter declarations completely.
